author: Peyton Tolbert
name: Model Stack BitNet MLP2304 + Overtone Embeddings, SP1024
blurb: Best Model Stack BitNet-compatible Parameter Golf run so far: runtime-row packed BitNet QAT, fused QKV FlashAttention, parallel Muon, dense training backward, 2304-wide ReLU2 MLP, and overtone spectral embedding initialization. The Model Stack BitNet int1+zlib artifact plus code fits the 16MB budget; the stock raw and generic int8+zlib artifacts emitted by this script do not.
competition_artifact_note: Under-budget for final_model.int1.ptz plus code. The default final_model.pt and generic final_model.int8.ptz artifacts exceed the 16,000,000-byte cap. The script writes and format-validates final_model.int1.ptz; a direct score-from-int1 restore/eval path is still needed for a fully competition-valid submitted artifact.
technique_summary: Model Stack TrainableBitNetLinear QAT + runtime-row packed export + MLP_HIDDEN_DIM=2304 + overtone spectral embedding init + fused QKV + FlashAttention + parallel Muon
